payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall vertical dark-painted wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and molded border; surface shows scuffs, wear and slight reflections on a matte/satin finish, right-side hardware is partially visible and the left/right edges are slightly cropped — approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark recessed-panel cabinet door (edge-cropped)","long_description":"Tall vertical dark-painted wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and molded border; surface shows scuffs, wear and slight reflections on a matte/satin finish, right-side hardware is partially visible and the left/right edges are slightly cropped — approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.","attributes":["dark painted wood","recessed center panel","molded border","scuffed/worn finish","matte/satin sheen","vertical rectangular","right-side hardware partially visible","edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
